I18N.DotNet.Tool 1.2.1
Copyright © 2022-2024 SafeTwice S.L.

  parse      Parse source files and generate a I18N development file.

  analyze    Analyze an I18N file.

  deploy     Generate a I18N deployment file.

  help       Display more information on a specific command.

  version    Display version information.

result.stderr:
I18N.DotNet.Tool 1.2.1
Copyright © 2022-2024 SafeTwice S.L.

  -i, --input               Required. Input file path.

  -d, --check-deprecated    Check presence of deprecated entries.

  -L, --check-language      Check for entries without translation for one or
                            more languages ('*' for any).

  -C, --include-context     Context to include in analysis.

  -E, --exclude-context     Context to exclude from analysis.

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.

result.stderr:
I18N.DotNet.Tool 1.2.1
Copyright © 2022-2024 SafeTwice S.L.

  -S, --sources               Required. Sources directory paths.

  -o, --output                Required. Output file path.

  -p, --file-pattern          (Default: *.cs) Source files name pattern.

  -r, --recursive             (Default: false) Scan in source directories
                              recursively.

  -k, --preserve-foundings    (Default: false) Preserve founding comments in
                              output file.

  -d, --mark-deprecated       (Default: false) Mark deprecated entries.

  -l, --with-lines            (Default: false) Include line numbers in founding
                              comments.

  -E, --extra-methods         Extra methods to be parsed for strings to be
                              localized.

  --help                      Display this help screen.

  --version                   Display version information.

I18N.DotNet.Tool 1.2.1
Copyright © 2022-2024 SafeTwice S.L.

  -S, --sources               Required. Sources directory paths.

  -o, --output                Required. Output file path.

  -p, --file-pattern          (Default: *.cs) Source files name pattern.

  -r, --recursive             (Default: false) Scan in source directories
                              recursively.

  -k, --preserve-foundings    (Default: false) Preserve founding comments in
                              output file.

  -d, --mark-deprecated       (Default: false) Mark deprecated entries.

  -l, --with-lines            (Default: false) Include line numbers in founding
                              comments.

  -E, --extra-methods         Extra methods to be parsed for strings to be
                              localized.

  --help                      Display this help screen.

  --version                   Display version information.
